sections.paragraph:
Original: לקט

Transliteration: lâqaṭ

Phonetic: law-kat'

BDB Definition:

  1. to pick up, gather, glean, gather up
    1. (Qal)
      1. to pick up, gather
      2. to glean
    2. (Piel)
      1. to gather, gather up
      2. to collect (money)
      3. to glean
    3. (Pual) to be picked up
    4. (Hithpael) to collect oneself

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1125

Part(s) of speech: Verb
